ddls:
CREATE TABLE "characters" (
  "character_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each character */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the character */,
  "class_id" INTEGER /* ID of the character class */,
  "level" INTEGER /* Current level of the character */,
  "experience_points" INTEGER /* Experience points earned by the character */,
  "experience_needed" INTEGER /* Experience points required for the next level */,
  "hit_points" INTEGER /* Current hit points of the character */,
  "armor_class" INTEGER /* Armor class of the character */,
  "initiative" INTEGER /* Initiative value of the character */,
  "base_attack_bonus" INTEGER /* Base attack bonus of the character */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("character_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_characters_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("class_id") REFERENCES character_classes ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "character_classes" (
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each character class */,
  "class_name" TEXT /* Name of the character class */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the character class */,
  "hit_die" INTEGER /* Hit die for the character class */,
  "skill_points" INTEGER /* Skill points for the character class */,
  "class_features" TEXT /* Class features for the character class */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "levels" (
  "level_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each level */,
  "level_name" TEXT /* Name of the level */,
  "base_attack_bonus" INTEGER /* Base attack bonus for the level */,
  "fort_save" INTEGER /* Fortitude save bonus for the level */,
  "ref_save" INTEGER /* Reflex save bonus for the level */,
  "will_save" INTEGER /* Will save bonus for the level */,
  "experience_needed" INTEGER /* Experience points required for the next level */,
  "hit_die_rolls" INTEGER /* Number of hit die rolls for the level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("level_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "abilities" (
  "ability_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ability */,
  "ability_name" TEXT /* Name of the ability */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the ability */,
  "ability_type" TEXT /* Type of ability (e.g., combat, skill, etc.) */,
  "ability_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the ability */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ability_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "character_abilities" (
  "character_id" INTEGER /* ID of the character */,
  "ability_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ability */,
  "ability_level" INTEGER /* Level at which the ability is acquired */,
  "ability_rank" TEXT /* Rank of the ability (e.g., novice, expert, master) */,
  "level_acquired" INTEGER /* Level at which the ability is acquired */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("character_id", "ability_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rogue_talents" (
  "rogue_talent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rogue talent */,
  "rogue_talent_name" TEXT /* Name of the rogue talent */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the rogue talent */,
  "rogue_talent_type" TEXT /* Type of rogue talent (e.g., combat, stealth, etc.) */,
  "rogue_talent_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the rogue talent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rogue_talent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "character_rogue_talents" (
  "character_id" INTEGER /* ID of the character */,
  "rogue_talent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the rogue talent */,
  "rogue_talent_level" INTEGER /* Level at which the rogue talent is acquired */,
  "rogue_talent_rank" TEXT /* Rank of the rogue talent (e.g., novice, expert, master) */,
  "level_acquired" INTEGER /* Level at which the rogue talent is acquired */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("character_id", "rogue_talent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enemies" (
  "enemy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enemy */,
  "enemy_name" TEXT /* Name of the enemy */,
  "hit_points" INTEGER /* Hit points of the enemy */,
  "attack_bonus" INTEGER /* Attack bonus of the enemy */,
  "enemy_type" TEXT /* Type of enemy (e.g., humanoid, beast, etc.) */,
  "enemy_size" TEXT /* Size of the enemy */,
  "enemy_speed" INTEGER /* Speed of the enemy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enemy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "combat_logs" (
  "combat_log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each combat log */,
  "character_id" INTEGER /* ID of the character */,
  "enemy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the enemy */,
  "combat_date_time" TEXT /* Date and time of the combat */,
  "outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the combat (win/loss) */,
  "combat_type" TEXT /* Type of combat (e.g., PvP, PvE, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("combat_log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_combat_logs_enemy_id FOREIGN KEY ("enemy_id") REFERENCES enemies ("enemy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_combat_logs_character_id FOREIGN KEY ("character_id") REFERENCES characters ("character_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_modes" (
  "game_mode_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game mode */,
  "game_mode_name" TEXT /* Name of the game mode */,
  "game_mode_description" TEXT /* Description of the game mode */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_mode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "character_game_modes" (
  "character_id" INTEGER /* ID of the character */,
  "game_mode_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game mode */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("character_id", "game_mode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "character_id" INTEGER /* ID of the character */,
  "game_mode_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game mode */,
  "playtime" INTEGER /* Total playtime for the character in the game mode */,
  "xp_earned" INTEGER /* Total experience points earned by the character in the game mode */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("character_id", "game_mode_id")
)
